sections.heading: New Features
items: Inactive Tabs Management — set rules to move inactive tabs (Never / 7 / 14 / 21 days)
Automatically close inactive tabs option — auto-cleans tabs older than 3 months
In-app Update dialog — prompts to upgrade with built-in changelog viewer
Full Changelog history screen added under Settings → About
Smart link & image context menus (Chrome-style: copy link address, text, open incognito)

sections.heading: Bug Fixes
items: My Photos no longer show broken images after app restart
Daily wallpaper rotation now works reliably
Fixed back button navigation in Settings
Context menu no longer mixes up links and images

sections.heading: What's New
items: Dark / light theme switching without restart
